components.defaultValue: Add your own content by selecting the edit button. If this form has a payment requirement, you can include a reminder in this section by selecting which payment amount you want to display.
components.whatHappensNextText: Your application will be processed by the xxxxx team who will contact you to advise that your proposed service has been approved or declined. They may also contact you for further information if needed.
components.thankYouText:
If you have any questions, contact (email address) with your Application ID number.

Thank you.
